meaning: Her(或His)Majesty's Australian Ship澳大利亚皇家海军舰艇
examples: That was enough to convince us he was an HMAS Sydney sailor.
This guy had been on the receiving end of German artillery, and had made it into an HMAS Sydney raft.
The ship HMAS Swan and the hospital ship Manundra were among the other ships that were severely damaged.
At least 11 vessels were involved in the search, led by Australian navy ship HMAS Maitland, which rescued 34 survivors, AMSA said.
